footer.description: The trusted provider in Spain of healthy puppies from ethical breeders. Specializing in the most popular dog breeds in Spain, such as the English Setter, Poodle, Dachshund, Golden Retriever, Chihuahua, Yorkshire Terrier and more. Licensed breeding and national delivery across all Spanish provinces. Comprehensive health guarantees and lifetime support for every puppy.
about.intro_part2: , we breed the cutest, smartest and healthiest dogs, raised at home, from small dogs to larger dogs, all from champion bloodlines.
about.mission_statement: We don't just breed puppies, we create lifelong family bonds. As Spain's leading ethical dog breeder, we specialize in the most popular and sought-after breeds, ensuring that every puppy receives the love, care and health attention they deserve from birth to their new home.
why_choose.title: Why choose Dulce Mascota
why_choose.point1_description: Our expert team has successfully placed over 3000 puppies with Spanish families, building a reputation for quality, health and exceptional customer service.
why_choose.point2_description: We specialize in breeding the 20 most in-demand breeds in Spain, including English Setter, Poodle, Dachshund, Golden Retriever, Chihuahua and many more, all with certified pedigree.
why_choose.point3_description: Every puppy is raised in a family environment with comprehensive health testing, proper socialization and veterinary care from day one.
why_choose.point4_description: Safe and comfortable transport to your home anywhere in Spain with our specialized puppy delivery service.
why_choose.point5_description: We stand behind every puppy with comprehensive health guarantees and ongoing support for the new family member.

testimonials.testimonial1_text: We had been looking for a healthy poodle with a good bloodline for months, and we found it here. The whole process was very clear, they explained the feeding and care, and they followed up after delivery. Our little Toby is a love.
contact.comment_label: Comment or short message about you and your family (optional)
about_us.founding_story: Founded in 2010, CachorrosSanos.es was born with a simple mission: to connect Spanish families with healthy, well-socialized puppies from ethical breeding practices. What started as a small family business has become Spain's most trusted source for premium purebred puppies, serving over 3000 families across all Spanish provinces.
about_us.everything_for_puppy_text: Here you will not only find your new four-legged companion, but also all the advice and support you need for its care: feeding tips, recommended accessories and guidelines for a successful adaptation to the home. Our experience and passion for animals make us a benchmark in responsible puppy sales in Spain.
about_us.our_mission_text: At CachorrosSanos.es, we believe that every family deserves the perfect puppy companion, and every puppy deserves a loving forever home. Our mission goes beyond breeding: we are family matchmakers, creating connections that last a lifetime.
about_us.difference_title: What sets us apart from other Spanish breeders
about_us.ethical_standards_text: Our commitment to ethical breeding means every breeding dog lives in a home environment, not cages. We prioritize their well-being above all, limiting litters to ensure mother's health and puppy quality.
about_us.family_environment_text: Puppies are raised within our home, socializing with children, other dogs, and the bustle of daily life. This ensures they arrive at your home with a solid foundation of confidence and adaptability.
about_us.health_program_text: Every puppy follows a rigorous veterinary protocol including vaccinations, deworming and check-ups. We perform genetic testing on parents to minimize the risk of hereditary diseases.
about_us.lifetime_support_text: Our relationship doesn't end with delivery. We offer ongoing advice on nutrition, training and health. We're just a call or message away to help you at any stage of your dog's life.
about_us.breeding_center_title: Our Breeding Center - Ethical Excellence in Action
about_us.center_license: Center License: Breeding center registered with Spanish authorities
about_us.vet_collaborations: Veterinary Collaborations: Certified veterinarians in Madrid, Barcelona and Valencia
about_us.breeding_philosophy_intro: We believe in quality over quantity. Unlike commercial breeding operations, we maintain smaller breeding programs focused on:
about_us.health_excellence_point: • Health Excellence: Every breeding dog undergoes comprehensive health testing
about_us.temperament_selection_point: • Temperament Selection: Only dogs with exceptional temperaments are part of our program
about_us.genetic_diversity_point: • Genetic Diversity: Meticulous breeding plans to maintain healthy genetic lines
about_us.early_development_point: • Early Development: Optimal nutrition and care from conception to adoption
about_us.phase1_point1: • Comprehensive health testing for breeding pairs
about_us.phase1_point4: • Beginning of home search for expected litters
about_us.phase2_point3: • Professional assistance during whelping if needed
about_us.phase3_point1: • Daily health monitoring and veterinary care
about_us.phase3_point4: • Weekly photo and video updates for families
about_us.phase4_point2: • Family consultations and guidance for preparation
about_us.genetic_health_guarantee: Genetic Health Guarantee: 2-year coverage for hereditary diseases
about_us.congenital_defects_coverage: Congenital Defects Coverage: Comprehensive coverage for congenital health issues
about_us.vaccination_protocol: Vaccination Protocol: Full vaccine series before delivery
about_us.health_documentation: Health Documentation: Complete veterinary history and certifications
about_us.pre_purchase_consultation: Pre-purchase consultation: Free breed selection and family compatibility advice
about_us.educational_support: Educational support: Training resources and guidance materials
about_us.emergency_line: 24/7 Emergency Line: Available for urgent health issues
about_us.lifetime_guidance: Lifetime Guidance: Ongoing support for training, health and behavior
about_us.why_choose_us_title: Why Spanish families choose Dulce Mascota
about_us.real_testimonials: Real testimonials from our extended family
about_us.testimonial1_text: After researching many breeders across Spain, CachorrosSanos stood out for their transparency and professionalism. Our Golden Retriever Max arrived perfectly healthy and well-socialized. The ongoing support has been invaluable.
about_us.testimonial2_text: As veterinarians, we were impressed by CachorrosSanos' health protocols and breeding practices. Our Dachshund Luna is a perfect example of responsible breeding.
about_us.testimonial2_author: - Dr. Herrera and Dr. Sánchez, Barcelona
about_us.testimonial3_text: The CachorrosSanos team didn't just sell us a puppy, they welcomed us into their extended family. The support continues two years later.
about_us.modern_facilities: Modern breeding facilities: Climate-controlled environments designed for optimal puppy development
about_us.vet_standards: Veterinary-level health standards: Professional medical equipment and protocols
about_us.socialization_areas: Socialization areas: Specially designed spaces for puppy socialization and early development
about_us.exercise_areas: Exercise and play areas: Extensive outdoor spaces for breeding dogs and older puppies

about_us.waste_management: Waste management: Professional waste disposal and facility maintenance

puppies.page_title: Puppies for Sale in Spain - All Breeds Available
puppies.intro_1: At Healthy Puppies, we follow a family tradition of over a generation of breeding healthy, balanced and happy puppies.
puppies.intro_2: All our breeds are raised in a family environment, with love, veterinary supervision and no intensive breeding farms or inflated prices.
puppies.intro_3: We offer accessible and carefully socialized puppies, with personalized attention to help you choose the ideal companion according to your lifestyle.
puppies.intro_4: We deliver throughout Spain with health guarantee, contract, follow-up and lifelong advice.
puppies.intro_5: If you are looking for a Mini, medium or large puppy, we are here to help you.
puppies.intro_6: Contact us and reserve your puppy: spots are limited.
puppies.find_perfect_companion: Find your perfect companion among our available puppies

shipping.subtitle_1: Safe and professional puppy delivery throughout Spain
shipping.subtitle_2: Nationwide delivery service: from our family to yours
shipping.intro: At CachorrosSanos.es, we understand that bringing your new puppy home is one of the most exciting moments in life. Our professional delivery service ensures your puppy arrives safely, comfortably and stress-free at your door, wherever you are in Spain.
shipping.full_coverage: Full coverage in Spain - No location is too far

warranty.title: Health Guarantee - Healthy Puppies For Sale
warranty.page_title: Health Guarantee - Healthy Puppies For Sale
warranty.subtitle: Comprehensive Health Guarantee: Your peace of mind
warranty.commitment_title: Our Commitment to Puppy Health Excellence
warranty.commitment_text: At Healthy Puppies, we stand behind every puppy with the most comprehensive health guarantee program in Spain. Our commitment to genetic testing, veterinary collaborations and ethical breeding practices ensures that your new family member starts life with the best possible health.
warranty.genetic_health: Genetic Health Guarantee - Full Coverage for 2 Years
warranty.condition_2: ✓ Progressive Retinal Atrophy (PRA) and other hereditary eye conditions
warranty.detail_1: • Full replacement puppy of equal or greater value
warranty.detail_2: • Full reimbursement of veterinary costs up to the purchase price
warranty.detail_3: • Transport costs covered for diagnosis and treatment
warranty.congenital_defects: Congenital Defects Guarantee - Coverage for 1 Year
warranty.defect_1: ✓ Cleft palate and other oral malformations
warranty.test_1: ✓ Hip and elbow evaluation - Official veterinary assessment
warranty.test_2: ✓ Eye degeneration test - Annual ophthalmological examination
warranty.test_3: ✓ Genetic panel test - Breed-specific DNA analysis
warranty.test_4: ✓ Heart disease screening - Cardiac examination and certification
warranty.test_6: ✓ General health evaluation - Complete physical exam and bloodwork
warranty.puppy_test_1: ✓ Complete physical examination by a licensed veterinarian
warranty.puppy_test_2: ✓ Age-appropriate vaccine series at time of delivery
warranty.puppy_test_4: ✓ Microchip identification - Registered to the new family
references.title: References - Healthy Puppies For Sale
references.testimonial_1: We bought our maltipoo from Healthy Puppies SA and couldn't be happier. He is playful, affectionate and arrived home perfectly cared for. The transport was safe and fast, and they sent us photos and videos before delivery. Thank you so much for everything!
references.testimonial_2: We had been looking for a healthy poodle with a good bloodline for months, and we found it here. The whole process was very clear, they explained the feeding and care, and they followed up after delivery. Our little Toby is a love.
references.testimonial_3: We received our little female maltipoo two weeks ago and she is already part of the family. She arrived vaccinated, dewormed and with her health record up to date. You can tell she is raised with love. I wouldn't hesitate to buy from them again.
references.testimonial_4: My son has always wanted a pug, and thanks to Direct Puppies we now have Bruno at home. He is healthy, happy and very sociable. The delivery was impeccable and the customer service excellent.
references.testimonial_5: I wanted a cane corso for companionship and protection, and they delivered a magnificent and balanced puppy. They advised me on training and feeding. Total professionalism.
references.testimonial_6: We adopted a pomeranian and it was the best decision. He is active, intelligent and very affectionate. The health guarantee gave us great peace of mind. Thank you for taking such good care of your puppies!
references.testimonial_7: Our labrador Max is a love with children. He arrived clean, with good weight and all his documentation. You can see the seriousness and commitment of this breeder. Highly recommended.
references.testimonial_8: I always wanted a dachshund and I was worried about finding a serious breeder. Here I found professionalism, good genetics and constant support. My puppy is strong and healthy.
references.testimonial_9: We received our french bulldog a month ago and he is the joy of the house. He is healthy, playful and very affectionate. The whole process was simple and without surprises.
references.testimonial_10: I bought my french bulldog here and I am delighted. He arrived happy, well cared for and adapted. They gave me all the indications for his care and to this day they answer all my questions.

legal_notice.meta_title: Privacy Policy - Healthy Puppies For Sale
legal_notice.company_description: Healthy Puppies - Ethical Dog Breeders in Spain
legal_notice.section_1.title: 1. General Information and Data Controller
legal_notice.section_1.description: At CachorrosSanos.es, we deeply value and respect your privacy and the protection of your personal data. This Privacy Policy establishes how we collect, use, store and protect your personal information when you visit our website, contact us or use our ethical puppy breeding services.
legal_notice.section_1.law_description: This Privacy Policy complies with current Spanish and European regulations on the protection of personal data on the Internet, specifically:
legal_notice.section_1.gdpr: Regulation (EU) 2016/679 of the European Parliament and of the Council, of April 27, 2016, on the protection of natural persons with regard to the processing of personal data and on the free movement of such data (GDPR)
legal_notice.section_1.lopdgdd: Organic Law 3/2018, of December 5, on the Protection of Personal Data and guarantee of digital rights (LOPDGDD)
legal_notice.section_1.lssi_ce: Law 34/2002, of July 11, on Information Society Services and Electronic Commerce (LSSI-CE)
legal_notice.section_1.royal_decree: Royal Decree 1720/2007, of December 21, approving the Regulations for the development of Organic Law 15/1999
legal_notice.section_2.title: 2. Principles of Personal Data Processing
legal_notice.section_2.description: The processing of your personal data is governed by the following principles established in Article 5 of the GDPR:
legal_notice.section_2.principle_1_desc: All data processing is carried out with a valid legal basis and in a transparent manner, providing clear and complete information about the use of your data.
legal_notice.section_2.principle_2_desc: Your personal data is collected only for specific, explicit and legitimate purposes related to our ethical puppy breeding services.
legal_notice.section_2.principle_3_desc: We collect only the personal data that is strictly necessary for the specific purposes of the processing.
legal_notice.section_2.principle_4_desc: We keep your data up to date and accurate, taking steps to rectify or delete inaccurate data without delay.
legal_notice.section_2.principle_5_desc: We keep your personal data only for as long as necessary for the purposes of the processing.
legal_notice.section_2.principle_6_desc: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to ensure the security of your personal data.
legal_notice.section_3.title: 3. Types of Personal Data We Collect
legal_notice.section_3.subsection_2.fami: Information about family composition (number of members, ages of children)
legal_notice.section_3.subsection_3.paym: Payment data (processed securely through certified providers)
legal_notice.section_3.subsection_3.tran: Transaction history related to puppy purchases
legal_notice.section_3.subsection_4.ip_a: IP address and approximate geographic location
legal_notice.section_3.subsection_5.mess: Message exchange via WhatsApp, email or web forms
legal_notice.section_3.subsection_5.phot: Photos and videos shared during the puppy selection process
legal_notice.section_4.title: 4. Purposes of Processing and Legal Basis
legal_notice.section_4.subsection_1.titl: 4.1 Management of Inquiries and Information Requests
legal_notice.section_4.subsection_1.purp: Purpose: Respond to your inquiries about breeds, puppy availability, prices and services
legal_notice.section_4.subsection_1.lega: Legal Basis: Legitimate interest and consent of the data subject
legal_notice.section_4.subsection_2.purp: Purpose: Manage the complete puppy reservation, sale and delivery process
legal_notice.section_4.subsection_2.lega: Legal Basis: Execution of the sales contract
legal_notice.section_4.subsection_2.rete: Retention: 10 years in accordance with Spanish commercial law
legal_notice.section_4.subsection_3.purp: Purpose: Provide ongoing support, health monitoring and warranty management
legal_notice.section_4.subsection_3.lega: Legal Basis: Execution of the contract and legitimate interest
legal_notice.section_4.subsection_3.rete: Retention: For the life of the animal (approximately 15 years)
legal_notice.section_4.subsection_4.purp: Purpose: Send information about new litters, events and educational content
legal_notice.section_4.subsection_4.lega: Legal Basis: Express consent of the data subject
legal_notice.section_4.subsection_5.purp: Purpose: Comply with legal obligations in health, tax and animal welfare matters
legal_notice.section_4.subsection_5.lega: Legal Basis: Compliance with legal obligations
legal_notice.section_4.subsection_5.rete: Retention: As established by applicable regulations
legal_notice.section_4.subsection_6.purp: Purpose: Analyze website usage and improve our services
legal_notice.section_5.title: 5. Recipients and Data Transfers
legal_notice.section_5.description: Your personal data may be communicated to the following categories of recipients:
legal_notice.section_5.subsection_1.vet_: Veterinary services: Collaborating veterinary clinics for health monitoring
legal_notice.section_5.subsection_1.tran: Transport services: Companies specialized in animal transport for deliveries
legal_notice.section_5.subsection_1.paym: Payment services: Secure payment platforms for transaction processing
legal_notice.section_5.subsection_1.tech: Technology services: Hosting, email marketing and web analytics providers
legal_notice.section_5.subsection_2.heal: Health authorities for compliance with animal welfare regulations
legal_notice.section_5.subsection_2.tax_: Tax administration for compliance with tax obligations
legal_notice.section_5.subsection_2.judi: Judicial authorities when required by law
legal_notice.section_5.subsection_3.rsce: Royal Canine Society of Spain (RSCE) for pedigree registration
legal_notice.section_5.subsection_3.bree: Breeder associations for certifications and verifications
legal_notice.section_5.important_note: Important: We do not sell, rent or transfer your personal data to third parties for commercial purposes.
legal_notice.section_6.title: 6. International Data Transfers
legal_notice.section_6.description: Some of our technology service providers may be located outside the European Economic Area (EEA). In these cases:
legal_notice.section_6.check_protection: We verify that the destination country has an adequate level of protection according to the European Commission
legal_notice.section_6.apply_safeguards: We apply appropriate safeguards through standard contractual clauses
legal_notice.section_6.guarantee_rights: We guarantee that your data protection rights are respected
legal_notice.section_6.main_destinations: The main destinations for international transfers include:
legal_notice.section_6.usa: United States: Providers certified under adequacy frameworks
legal_notice.section_6.uk: United Kingdom: Country with adequacy decision from the European Commission
legal_notice.section_7.title: 7. Security Measures and Data Protection
legal_notice.section_7.description: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data:
legal_notice.section_7.subsection_1.ssl: SSL/TLS encryption for all web communications
legal_notice.section_7.subsection_2.trai: Ongoing staff training in data protection
legal_notice.section_7.subsection_2.conf: Confidentiality agreements with all employees and collaborators
legal_notice.section_7.subsection_3.desc: In the event of a security breach that may pose a risk to your rights:
legal_notice.section_7.subsection_3.noti: We will notify the AEPD within a maximum of 72 hours
legal_notice.section_7.subsection_3.info: We will inform you directly if the risk is high for your rights and freedoms
legal_notice.section_7.subsection_3.corr: We will implement immediate corrective measures
legal_notice.section_8.title: 8. Your Rights as a Data Subject
legal_notice.section_8.description: In accordance with the GDPR and LOPDGDD, you have the following rights:
legal_notice.section_8.subsection_1.desc: You can request information about what personal data we process, for what purpose, for how long and to whom we communicate it.
legal_notice.section_8.subsection_2.desc: You can request the correction of inaccurate or incomplete personal data.
legal_notice.section_8.subsection_3.titl: 8.3 Right to Erasure - 'Right to be Forgotten' (Art. 17 GDPR)
legal_notice.section_8.subsection_3.desc: You can request the deletion of your personal data when:
legal_notice.section_8.subsection_3.reas: They are no longer necessary for the original purposes
You withdraw your consent and there is no other legal basis
legal_notice.section_8.subsection_4.titl: 8.4 Right to Restriction of Processing (Art. 18 GDPR)
legal_notice.section_8.subsection_4.desc: You can request the suspension of the processing of your data in certain circumstances.
legal_notice.section_8.subsection_5.desc: You can request to receive your data in a structured, commonly used format, or to have us transmit it directly to another controller.
legal_notice.section_8.subsection_6.desc: You can object to the processing of your data for reasons related to your particular situation.
legal_notice.section_8.subsection_7.titl: 8.7 Rights Relating to Automated Decisions (Art. 22 GDPR)
legal_notice.section_8.subsection_7.desc: You have the right not to be subject to decisions based solely on automated processing.
legal_notice.section_8.subsection_8.desc: You can withdraw your consent at any time without affecting the lawfulness of prior processing.
legal_notice.section_8.exercise_rights.d: To exercise any of these rights, you can contact us through:
legal_notice.section_8.exercise_rights.r: Required documentation: Copy of ID/Passport or valid identification document
Response time: Maximum 1 month from receipt of your request
legal_notice.section_9.title: 9. Cookies and Similar Technologies
legal_notice.section_9.subsection_1.anal: Purpose: Statistical analysis of website usage
legal_notice.section_9.subsection_2.desc: You can manage your cookie preferences through:
legal_notice.section_9.subsection_2.conf: Cookie configuration panel on our website
legal_notice.section_9.subsection_2.brow: Your browser settings to block or delete cookies
legal_notice.section_9.subsection_2.thir: Specific tools provided by third parties
legal_notice.section_9.subsection_2.impo: Important: Disabling technical cookies may affect website functionality.
legal_notice.section_10.title: 10. Minors
legal_notice.section_10.subsection_1.des: In accordance with Article 8 of the GDPR and Article 7 of the LOPDGDD:
legal_notice.section_10.subsection_1.min: Minimum age: 14 years to give valid consent
legal_notice.section_10.subsection_1.und: Under 14 years: Requires parental or guardian consent
legal_notice.section_10.subsection_1.ver: Verification: We implement measures to verify age and parental consent
legal_notice.section_10.subsection_1.spe: Special protection: We apply additional protection measures for minors' data
legal_notice.section_10.subsection_2.des: Minors and their legal representatives may exercise all the rights established in this privacy policy.
legal_notice.section_11.title: 11. Data Protection Officer (DPO)
legal_notice.section_11.description: Although we are not legally required to appoint a Data Protection Officer, we have appointed a privacy manager:
legal_notice.section_11.responsibilities: Supervise compliance with data protection regulations
Act as contact point with the AEPD
Provide advice on data protection matters
legal_notice.section_12.title: 12. Retention of Personal Data
legal_notice.section_12.subsection_1.des: Retention periods are determined based on:
legal_notice.section_12.subsection_1.exe: Exercise of rights and legal defense
legal_notice.section_12.subsection_2.hea: Duration: Lifespan of the animal (up to 15 years)
legal_notice.section_12.subsection_2.inq: Justification: Legitimate interest in future commercial opportunities
legal_notice.section_12.subsection_2.mar: Justification: Consent of the data subject
legal_notice.section_12.subsection_3.des: Upon expiration of retention periods, we proceed with the secure deletion of data through:
legal_notice.section_13.title: 13. Data Protection Impact Assessment
legal_notice.section_13.description: We conduct impact assessments (DPIA) when our processing activities may pose a high risk to individuals' rights and freedoms, especially in cases of:
legal_notice.section_13.data_combination: Combination of data from different sources
legal_notice.section_14.title: 14. Complaints to the Supervisory Authority
legal_notice.section_14.description: If you consider that the processing of your personal data does not comply with current regulations, you may file a complaint with the competent supervisory authority:
legal_notice.section_14.procedure.title: Procedure:
legal_notice.section_14.procedure.presen: Submission: Via the electronic office or in person
legal_notice.section_14.procedure.docume: Documentation: Identification of the complainant and description of the facts
legal_notice.section_14.procedure.proces: Processing: The AEPD will evaluate the complaint and may initiate sanctioning procedures
legal_notice.section_14.procedure.rights: Rights: You may be represented by a lawyer and a solicitor
legal_notice.section_15.title: 15. Modifications to the Privacy Policy
legal_notice.section_15.subsection_1.des: This Privacy Policy may be modified to adapt to:
legal_notice.section_15.subsection_1.new: New services or features on our website
legal_notice.section_15.subsection_1.imp: Improvements to our data protection practices
legal_notice.section_15.subsection_2.des: We will notify you of any substantial changes through:
legal_notice.section_15.subsection_2.not: Prominent notice on our website for at least 30 days
legal_notice.section_15.subsection_2.ema: Informative email to our client database
legal_notice.section_15.subsection_2.upd: Update of the 'last modified' date in the document header
legal_notice.section_15.subsection_3.des: Continued use of our services after publication of the modifications will constitute your acceptance of the new terms.
legal_notice.section_16.title: 16. Contact Information and Inquiries
legal_notice.section_17.title: 17. Language and Jurisdiction
legal_notice.section_17.subsection_1.des: This Privacy Policy is available in Spanish. In case of translation into other languages, the Spanish version shall always prevail.
legal_notice.section_17.subsection_2.des: This Privacy Policy is governed by current Spanish and European legislation. Any dispute arising from the processing of personal data shall be submitted to the jurisdiction of the Courts of Madrid, Spain.
legal_notice.section_18.title: 18. Transparency Statement
legal_notice.section_18.description: At CachorrosSanos.es we are committed to:
legal_notice.section_18.transparency: ✓ Total transparency in the processing of your personal data
legal_notice.section_18.agile_response: ✓ Agile response to your inquiries and exercise of rights
legal_notice.section_18.continuous_impro: ✓ Continuous improvement of our data protection practices
legal_notice.section_18.strict_complianc: ✓ Strict compliance with Spanish and European regulations
legal_notice.section_18.constant_trainin: ✓ Constant training of our team in data protection
legal_notice.section_18.responsible_inno: ✓ Responsible innovation in the use of new technologies
legal_notice.section_18.quality_commitme: We maintain the highest standards in data protection because we understand that the trust of our families is fundamental to our business model based on ethical breeding and long-term support.
legal_notice.section_19.title: 19. Effective Date
legal_notice.section_19.effective_date: This Privacy Policy comes into effect on September 1, 2024 and replaces any previous version.
legal_notice.section_19.footer_text: CachorrosSanos.es - Ethical Dog Breeders in Spain
legal_notice.section_19.tagline: Where every puppy finds its perfect family - Ethical breeding, lifetime support
legal_notice.section_19.contact_invitati: For any questions about this Privacy Policy, please do not hesitate to contact us at atencionalcliente@huellasreales.eu or +34 613 31 31 03.
form.validation.required: Please fill in all required fields
form.success: ✓ Message sent successfully! We will get back to you as soon as possible.
returns_policy.meta_title: Returns Policy - Healthy Puppies For Sale
returns_policy.intro_2: , our priority is the health and well-being of every puppy we deliver. That's why our policies are designed to protect both our customers and the animals.
returns_policy.general_conditions.title: General Conditions
returns_policy.general_conditions.descri: Due to the nature of our product (living beings), we do not accept returns for changes of mind or personal preferences once the puppy has been delivered. Each puppy is examined by a veterinarian before shipping to ensure it arrives in perfect health.
returns_policy.health_guarantee.title: Health Guarantee
returns_policy.health_guarantee.delivere: All our puppies are delivered with:
returns_policy.health_guarantee.vaccinat: Vaccinations and deworming appropriate for their age.
returns_policy.health_guarantee.vet_cert: Veterinary certificate attesting to their good health.
returns_policy.health_guarantee.within_2: , a licensed veterinarian detects a serious congenital disease not visible in the prior examination, the customer may request a solution, which may consist of:
returns_policy.health_guarantee.replacem: Replacement with another puppy of similar characteristics (subject to availability).
returns_policy.health_guarantee.compensa: Or, a compensation agreement between the two parties.
returns_policy.exclusions.title: Exclusions
returns_policy.exclusions.health_issues: Illnesses or health problems caused by mishandling, accidents, negligence or lack of care after delivery.
returns_policy.exclusions.adaptation_iss: Problems arising from sudden dietary changes or adaptation stress.
returns_policy.transport_delivery.title: Transport and Delivery
returns_policy.transport_delivery.descri: In the event that the puppy needs to be returned or replaced for approved veterinary reasons, transport will be coordinated by
and will be carried out in safe conditions for the animal.
hero.welcome_subtitle: Your trusted family for healthy puppies in Spain
puppy.imagine_this_puppy: Imagine this puppy brightening up your home!
puppy.imagine_your_new_puppy: Imagine your new puppy running to greet you, wagging its tail with joy. This puppy is perfect for families, walks or cozy apartments, ready to fill your life with love. Raised with care for over 15 years, our exclusive litters stand out for their health, temperament and beauty. Only a few left this month!
puppy.why_best_option: Why are we your best option?
puppy.impeccable_health: Impeccable health: Vaccinated, dewormed, microchipped, with veterinary certificate and 2-year genetic guarantee.
puppy.ethical_breeder: Ethical breeder: Member of the RSCE, official pedigree, verified lineage.
puppy.welcome_package: Welcome pack: Premium food (1 week), blanket with maternal scent, toy and care guides.
puppy.permanent_support: Permanent support: Post-partum call, lifelong support and relocation assistance.
puppy.ready_to_meet: Ready to meet your new puppy? Fill out our free form (only 2 minutes!) to get exclusive photos and videos. Reserve and secure your puppy before it finds another home. 5% discount for full payment.
puppy.hurry_message: Hurry up! Puppies go fast. Fill out the form now or contact us on WhatsApp to start this furry adventure.
